summary: P3 Features Testing Complete - 3 NEW features tested: (1) Analytics with period filters (Tout/30j/3m/1an), 6 KPIs, Recharts (Line/Pie/Bar), events table. (2) Community with pagination (page/limit params, 'Charger plus' button), post/like/reply/pin/delete. (3) Refunds Admin with status filters (Tous/En attente/Approuves/Refuses), 4 summary cards, admin notes on reject. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components working.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 when section first loads. Non-critical - charts render correctly after becoming visible.

passed_tests: BACKEND: Analytics default (all) - returns overview with 6 KPIs (total_events, total_registrations, total_revenue, shop_revenue, checked_in, checkin_rate)
BACKEND: Analytics period=30d - filters registrations to last 30 days
BACKEND: Analytics period=90d - filters registrations to last 90 days
BACKEND: Analytics period=365d - filters registrations to last year
BACKEND: Analytics events breakdown - returns per-event stats with registrations, revenue, checkin_rate
BACKEND: Analytics monthly_trend - returns monthly data for line chart
BACKEND: Analytics requires auth - returns 401/403 without token
BACKEND: Community posts default page - returns posts, total, page
BACKEND: Community pagination page=1&limit=10 - returns correct page
BACKEND: Community pagination page=2 - returns second page of posts
BACKEND: Community post create - creates post with post_id, author_name, content
BACKEND: Community post like toggle - returns liked boolean
BACKEND: Community get replies - returns replies array
BACKEND: Community create reply - creates reply on post
BACKEND: Refunds all no filter - returns refunds array + stats (total, pending, approved, rejected, total_refunded)
BACKEND: Refunds filter=pending - returns only pending refunds
BACKEND: Refunds filter=approved - returns only approved refunds
BACKEND: Refunds filter=rejected - returns only rejected refunds
BACKEND: Refunds stats include total_refunded amount
BACKEND: Refunds requires admin role - returns 403 for organizer
FRONTEND: Analytics section loads with 6 KPI cards (Events=19, Inscriptions=2, Revenus=58€, Boutique=231€, Check-in=0%, Revenu Total=289€)
FRONTEND: Analytics period filter buttons (Tout, 30 jours, 3 mois, 1 an) all clickable and functional
FRONTEND: Analytics Line Chart (Tendance Mensuelle) with Inscriptions/Revenus legend
FRONTEND: Analytics Bar Chart (Revenus par Evenement) horizontal bars
FRONTEND: Analytics Pie Chart (Repartition Inscriptions) present
FRONTEND: Analytics Events Table (Detail par Evenement) header visible
FRONTEND: Community section header shows message count
FRONTEND: Community new post form visible for logged-in users (avatar, textarea, Publier button)
FRONTEND: Community posts display author, date, content, likes, reply count
FRONTEND: Community like button toggles on posts
FRONTEND: Community reply toggle expands replies section
FRONTEND: Community reply input appears when expanded
FRONTEND: Community pin/delete icons visible for organizer
FRONTEND: Refunds Admin - 4 summary cards (Demandes en attente, Approuves, Refuses, Montant Rembourse)
FRONTEND: Refunds Admin - Filter buttons (Tous, En attente, Approuves, Refuses) all clickable
FRONTEND: Refunds Admin - Table with empty state message when no refunds
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions can be reduced by adding minHeight to ResponsiveContainer in OrganizerAnalyticsSection.js
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed community posts during testing (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 improved features fully tested: (1) Analytics - OrganizerAnalyticsSection.js uses Recharts with LineChart, PieChart, BarChart. Period filter (all/30d/90d/365d) works via ?period= param. 6 KPI cards display overview stats. (2) Community - EventCommunity.js has pagination via page/limit params, 'Charger plus' button appears when posts > limit (not visible in test as only 4 posts exist). Post creation, liking, replying, pinning, deleting all work. (3) Refunds Admin - AdminDashboard.js Remboursements tab has 4 summary cards, status filter buttons (all/pending/approved/rejected), refunds table with approve/reject actions. Empty state shown when no refunds. All backend APIs verified with pytest, all frontend components verified with Playwright.

analytics_period_filter.details: 6 KPIs, 4 period filter buttons, Line/Pie/Bar charts, Events table

community_pagination.details: Post form, post list with pagination, like/reply/pin/delete features

refunds_admin_filters.details: 4 summary cards, status filter buttons, approve/reject with admin notes

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Not configured - SMS notifications saved to DB queue only
